info.title: Professional Verification API
info.description: Spec 020 (Phase 1D · Milestone 7) — placeholder stub. Endpoints land per slice in Phases 3-7 of specs/phase-1D/020-verification/tasks.md. Customer + Admin + Eligibility + Workers surfaces are owned by this module; cross-module hooks live under Modules/Shared/. Restricted-product eligibility query (ICustomerVerificationEligibilityQuery) consumed by specs 005 / 009 / 010 / 019 / 021 / 023.
